programme.title: Conan the Destroyer
programme.desc: In his second cinematic adventure, the mighty warrior Conan (Arnold Schwarzenegger) is tricked into working for the scheming Queen Taramis (Sarah Douglas). Along with finding a mystical horn, Conan and his allies, which include the fierce fighter, Zula (Grace Jones), and the wisecracking sorcerer, Akiro (Mako), must protect the beautiful young Princess Jehnna (Olivia d'Abo). With deception and danger at every turn, Conan has to use all of his power to defeat the evil foes that stand in his way.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: The Running Man
programme.desc: In the year 2019, America is a totalitarian state where the favorite television program is "The Running Man" -- a game show in which prisoners must run to freedom to avoid a brutal death. Having been made a scapegoat by the government, an imprisoned Ben Richards (Arnold Schwarzenegger) has the opportunity to make it back to the outside again by being a contestant on the deadly show, although the twisted host, Damon Killian (Richard Dawson), has no intention of letting him escape.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Total Recall
programme.desc: Douglas Quaid is a bored construction worker in the year 2084 who dreams of visiting colonized Mars. He visits "Rekall," a company that plants false memories into people's brains, in order to experience the thrill of Mars without having to travel there. But something goes wrong during the procedure; Quaid discovers that his entire life is actually a false memory and that the people who implanted it in his head now want him dead.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: Commando
programme.desc: Retired Special Forces soldier John Matrix (Arnold Schwarzenegger) lives with daughter Jenny (Alyssa Milano) in isolation, but his privacy is disturbed by former commander Franklin Kirby (James Olson), who warns him that his fellow soldiers are getting killed one by one. After Kirby leaves, Jenny is kidnapped by former Latin American dictator Arius (Dan Hedaya), who wants Matrix to restore him to power. Instead, Matrix sets out to take down the rogue leader and rescue his daughter.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Conan the Barbarian
programme.desc: Orphaned boy Conan (Arnold Schwarzenegger) is enslaved after his village is destroyed by the forces of vicious necromancer Thulsa Doom (James Earl Jones), and is compelled to push "The Wheel of Pain" for many years. Once he reaches adulthood, Conan sets off across the prehistoric landscape of the Hyborian Age in search of the man who killed his family and stole his father's sword. With beautiful warrior Valeria (Sandahl Bergman) and archer Subotai (Gerry Lopez), he faces a supernatural evil.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Planet Earth
programme.desc: Time lapse footage taken from 2,000m down captures eels, crabs and isopods.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Hidden Habitats
programme.desc: Wolves are released into Yellowstone National Park after a 70-year absence, setting off a series of events within the food chain.

programme.title: Starship Troopers
programme.desc: In the distant future, the Earth is at war with a race of giant alien insects. Little is known about the Bugs except that they are intent on the eradication of all human life. But there was a time before the war... A Mobile Infantry travels to distant alien planets to take the war to the Bugs. They are a ruthless enemy with only one mission: Survival of their species no matter what the cost...

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Centre national du cinéma et de l'image animée
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Walden tries to loosen Zooey up by sharing some of Berta's special brownies.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: When a huge storm keeps Walden, Alan, Zoey and Lindsay at home on Valentine's Day, conflict brews and relationships are strained.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: A near-death experience has an adverse effect on Zoey and Walden's relationship; Alan thinks Lyndsey may have a drinking problem.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Walden's ex-business partner shows up at the beach house looking to make peace.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Alan and Lyndsey introduce their mothers; Jake and Eldridge get a ride from Walden to a party.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Walden tells Zoey that he will be going into business with his ex-wife (Judy Greer); Lyndsey and Alan grapple with their mothers' new relationship.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Zoey and her daughter move in with Walden; Alan gets more than he bargained for with Lyndsey.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: When Alan has a heart attack, Charlie's ghost (Kathy Bates) visits him.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.sub-title: The Straw in My Donut Hole
programme.desc: Zoey isn't convinced Alan deserves all the love and affection he receives upon his return from the hospital.

programme.title: Total Recall
programme.desc: Douglas Quaid is a bored construction worker in the year 2084 who dreams of visiting colonized Mars. He visits "Rekall," a company that plants false memories into people's brains, in order to experience the thrill of Mars without having to travel there. But something goes wrong during the procedure; Quaid discovers that his entire life is actually a false memory and that the people who implanted it in his head now want him dead.

programme.desc: In the year 2019, America is a totalitarian state where the favorite television program is "The Running Man" -- a game show in which prisoners must run to freedom to avoid a brutal death. Having been made a scapegoat by the government, an imprisoned Ben Richards (Arnold Schwarzenegger) has the opportunity to make it back to the outside again by being a contestant on the deadly show, although the twisted host, Damon Killian (Richard Dawson), has no intention of letting him escape.

programme.title: Commando
programme.desc: Retired Special Forces soldier John Matrix (Arnold Schwarzenegger) lives with daughter Jenny (Alyssa Milano) in isolation, but his privacy is disturbed by former commander Franklin Kirby (James Olson), who warns him that his fellow soldiers are getting killed one by one. After Kirby leaves, Jenny is kidnapped by former Latin American dictator Arius (Dan Hedaya), who wants Matrix to restore him to power. Instead, Matrix sets out to take down the rogue leader and rescue his daughter.

Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Road House
programme.desc: The Double Deuce is the meanest, loudest and rowdiest bar south of the Mason-Dixon Line, and Dalton (Patrick Swayze) has been hired to clean it up. He might not look like much, but the Ph.D.-educated bouncer proves he's more than capable -- busting the heads of troublemakers and turning the roadhouse into a jumping hot-spot. But Dalton's romance with the gorgeous Dr. Clay (Kelly Lynch) puts him on the bad side of cutthroat local big shot Brad Wesley (Ben Gazzara).

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A criminal makes a startling deathbed confession; Detective Fontana reopens a 10-year-old case file concerning the murder of a 12-year-old girl.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Detectives investigate when a man is killed by a car bomb before he can disconnect his incapacitated wife's feeding tube.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Detectives learn that a murdered prostitute was actually an undercover reporter trying to expose a brutal gang.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A nurse practitioner with a social agenda faces charges when an abusive young mother accused of murder suddenly dies in her jail cell; detectives learn she may have been sterilized, without knowing it.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A single mother is killed, and her baby is stolen; police locate the child with a woman who took the infant while pretending to be pregnant.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Detectives link the owner of a trucking company to the smuggling of illegal aliens and suspect a citizen border-patrol member of his killing.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: When detectives investigate a series of seemingly random murders, they find a hit list that includes Jack McCoy; he realizes the people on the list are jurors from trial of a multiple murderer he prosecuted years ago.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Bones
programme.desc: A human jawbone found at the Jeffersonian alerts Brennan and the team that the Gormogon serial killer has struck again; a lab explosion lands Zack in the hospital; Gormogon's silver skeleton disappears from the vault.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Bones
programme.desc: When Brennan and Booth go to London to guest-lecture at Oxford and Scotland Yard, local officials ask them to help investigate the murder of a young heiress; Angela's long-estranged husband returns.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Bones
programme.desc: When Brennan and Booth go to London to guest-lecture at Oxford and Scotland Yard, local officials ask them to help investigate the murder of a young heiress; Angela's long-estranged husband returns.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Bones
programme.desc: When the corpse of the host of a popular reality show is found partially decomposed in an outhouse, Brennan and Booth must separate the killer from many suspects; Booth discovers that Brennan juggles two relationships.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Bones
programme.desc: When Booth's son, Parker, finds a finger in a bird's nest, the team launches an investigation to find the rest of the body; Booth asks Sweets to psychoanalyze his son; Sweets confronts Hodgins about his attitude in the lab.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Warriors
programme.desc: A turf battle between New York City street gangs that rages from Coney Island to the Bronx. The Warriors are mistakenly fingered for the killing of a gang leader. Soon they have every gang in the city out to get revenge, and they must make their way across the city to their own turf.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Kindergarten Cop
programme.desc: In this action-comedy, unusual circumstances find big, brawny cop John Kimble (Arnold Schwarzenegger) posing as a kindergarten teacher in order to apprehend major drug lord Cullen Crisp (Richard Tyson), as well as his ruthless accomplice and mother, Eleanor (Carroll Baker). While pretending to be a kid-friendly instructor, Kimble falls for pretty fellow teacher Joyce Palmieri (Penelope Ann Miller) as he battles both unruly children and dangerous bad guys.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: Conan the Barbarian
programme.desc: Orphaned boy Conan (Arnold Schwarzenegger) is enslaved after his village is destroyed by the forces of vicious necromancer Thulsa Doom (James Earl Jones), and is compelled to push "The Wheel of Pain" for many years. Once he reaches adulthood, Conan sets off across the prehistoric landscape of the Hyborian Age in search of the man who killed his family and stole his father's sword. With beautiful warrior Valeria (Sandahl Bergman) and archer Subotai (Gerry Lopez), he faces a supernatural evil.

programme.title: Road House
programme.desc: The Double Deuce is the meanest, loudest and rowdiest bar south of the Mason-Dixon Line, and Dalton (Patrick Swayze) has been hired to clean it up. He might not look like much, but the Ph.D.-educated bouncer proves he's more than capable -- busting the heads of troublemakers and turning the roadhouse into a jumping hot-spot. But Dalton's romance with the gorgeous Dr. Clay (Kelly Lynch) puts him on the bad side of cutthroat local big shot Brad Wesley (Ben Gazzara).

Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Demolition Man
programme.desc: With innocent victims caught in the crossfire in Los Angeles' intensifying war on crime, both cop John Spartan (Sylvester Stallone) and violent thug Simon Phoenix (Wesley Snipes) are sentenced to a state of frozen incarceration known as "CryoPrison." When Spartan is finally thawed 36 years later, it's 2032, and Los Angeles is now a pacifist utopia called San Angeles. But with Phoenix again on the loose, Spartan must team up with future cop Lenina (Sandra Bullock) to apprehend the killer.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: When Lt. Van Buren's college friend's daughter is found dead, she leads a no-holds-barred mission to catch the serial assailant who attacked her in the past.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
